title: Fix Storybook CI failure after dashboard audit lock sync

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Investigating SB_BUILDER-WEBPACK5_0002: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'tap') in Storybook preview build on PR #366.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Root cause isolated: dashboard CI ran Node 18.x while next@15.6.0-canary.61 requires Node >=20.9.0; Storybook build failures were downstream compatibility errors. Implemented fixes: set dashboard CI jobs to Node 20.x, aligned dashboard engines.node to >=20.9.0, added explicit webpack devDependency (5.101.2) required by @storybook/nextjs, and verified storybook build succeeds on Node 20 with npm ci.
